name: colsein-app
description: COLSEIN S.A.S. — Sistema de Gestión de Gastos y Kilometraje

scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.railway:build: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && npm run build
scripts.railway:start: cd backend && npx sequelize-cli db:migrate; npm start
